name: PersonalFileStreamBot
description: A Personal & Clean Telegram Bot to Generate High Speed Direct Download Links.

ULOG_CHANNEL.description: ID of Channel Where store New Users data.

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram User ID as Owner

DATABASE_URL.description: MongoDB URI for saving User Data and Files List.

AUTH_USERS.description: Put IDs of Authorized Users. Separate multiple IDs with Space.

SLEEP_THRESHOLD.description: Set global flood wait threshold under 60s.

WORKERS.description: No. of workers that is to be assigned.

PORT.description: The port that you want your webapp to be listened to

NO_PORT.description: If you don't want your port to be displayed. Set True or False

HAS_SSL.description: If you want the generated links in https format.

FQDN.description: Your Live App Domain Link without http/s:// (e.g. your-app.koyeb.app)

URL.description: Optional Full Custom URL including https://

SESSION_NAME.description: Name for the Database created on your MongoDB. Defaults to FileStream
